tables: Rajasthan Staff Selection Board RSSB Women Supervisor Recruitment 2026 Exam City / Admit Card

Rajasthan Staff Selection Board RSSB RSMSSB has released the Women Supervisor Notification 2026. Those candidates who are interested in this Rajasthan Women Supervisor Recruitment 2026 Exam can Apply Online from 07 January 2026 to 11 February 2026. Read the notification for RSSB Women Supervisor Exam, eligibility, Subject Details information, Document Required, age limit, How to Apply and all other information.
Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSSB) RSSB Women Supervisor Recruitment 2026 RSSB Advt. No. 02/2026 : Short Details of Notification WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM
Important Dates Application Begin : 07/01/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 11/02/2026 Last Date Pay Exam Fee : 11/02/2026 Exam Date : 24/07/2026 Admit Card Available : 20/07/2026

Application Fee General / OBC: 600/- OBC NCL / SC / ST : 400/- Correction Charges : 300/- Note: This fee is for one time registration, now after paying the OTR fee once, the candidate will not have to pay the application fee again and again. Pay the Examination Fee Through Cast at E Challan or Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking
RSSB Women Supervisor Notification 2025 : Age Limit as on 01/01/2027 Minimum Age : 18 Years Maximum Age : 40 Years Age Relaxation Extra as per RSSB Women Supervisor Recruitment Rules.
RSSB Women Supervisor Recruitment 2026: Vacancy Details Total : 72 Post
TSP : 15 Post Non TSP : 57 Post Total 72 Post

Bachelor Degree from Any Recognized Board/University in India. O Level / COPA / Degree / Diploma / Certificate in Computer Science / Application / 10+2 with Computer Subject / Diploma in Computer Science Polytechnic / RSCIT. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification.

How to Fill RSSB Women Supervisor Recruitment Online Form 2026 RSSB Women Supervisor Recruitment for Various Post Candidate Can Apply Between 07/01/2026 to 11/02/2026 Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in RSSB Women Supervisor Recruitment 2026. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
